summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Apartment Rent Payment Kiosk System. All backend APIs (100% success), kiosk flow, tenant lookup, and admin dashboard functionality verified. Dutch language interface working correctly. Minor payment flow navigation issue identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Payment flow navigation loops back to apartment selection instead of proceeding to receipt screen

passed_tests: Backend API testing - all 13 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Kiosk welcome screen with 'Welkom' heading and 'Start Betaling' button
Apartment selection grid showing 6 apartments with occupied/vacant status
Tenant overview for A101 (Radjesh Kanhai) with complete financial details
Tenant lookup by code HUR001 successful
Tenant lookup by apartment code A101 successful
Admin dashboard with statistics and recent payments
Admin tenant management with 4 tenants and financial status
Admin apartment management with 6 apartments and CRUD functions
Admin payment history with search functionality (9 payments visible)
Admin Tuya breaker panel with 6 breakers and toggle controls (MOCKED)
SRD currency formatting and financial calculations
Google Auth session injection working for admin access
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix payment confirmation flow navigation - currently loops back to apartment selection instead of proceeding to receipt screen after payment confirmation. This breaks the complete payment workflow in the kiosk.
